embeds.description: 1/1 Update Notes: New tier created to declutter the former tier 3 and move up some of the stronger characters from the tier below it. Nautila moved up for her absurd tankiness and Thais moved down because devour effects haven’t really kept up with power creep. Might move Tulu up but need to us...
